## Testing

<!-- How was this tested? Which tests were added or modified? -->

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`uv run ruff check src/ && uv run mypy src/`)
- [ ] Smoke test passes (`uv run python sample_app.py`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Type annotations added for all new public functions/methods
- [ ] Docstrings updated for any changed public API
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (under `[Unreleased]`)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
